name: Observability Completion Agent
description: Delivered full visibility into Decision PPO + ExecutionAgent rich telemetry layer. TUI and React now have dedicated panels showing TradeDecision specs (lot sizing, TP/SL types, trailing strategies, partial ladders), current managed positions with attribution, and execution feedback stream.

deliverables.tui: scripts/monitor_tui.py: get_rich_decision_execution_panel() + helpers (_load_recent_rich_decisions, _load_live_managed_positions, _load_execution_feedback_stream) integrated into dashboard. Shows full specs + MQL5/Python parity.
deliverables.react: frontend/src/components/DecisionExecutionPanel.tsx (new) + types in types.ts + fetch* in api.ts + tab integration in App.tsx. Backed by /api/execution/* endpoints.
deliverables.execution_layer: Python/execution/execution_agent.py: ExecutionReport now carries full 'decision' spec; _write_live_observability_status() emits runtime/agent_status/decision_ppo_execution_live.json; log_decision() calls for trade_decision_ppo into PIPELINE_DECISIONS.jsonl; _after_state_change hooks on all paths.
deliverables.data_emission: runtime/agent_status/decision_ppo_execution_live.json (live rich state), execution_reports/<decision_id>.json (with full decision), mql5_commands/decision_*.json (already rich), PIPELINE_DECISIONS now receives trade_decision_ppo events, execution_feedback.jsonl.
deliverables.compatibility: All panels read FS artifacts (reports + mql5 cmds + feedback + live status) — identical behavior for pure Python fallback and MQL5 bridge execution. No dependency on in-process agent.

panels_features: Recent rich decisions table: decision_id, symbol/side, size(mode+val), SL(type+val), TP, trailing type, partials count, realized_pnl, backend/status
Current managed positions with TradeDecision specs (side, trailing, confidence, open vol/PnL)
Sources note always visible for audit

Timing extension (2026-05-28 Observability & Dreamer/Rainforest Timing Integration): TimeExitSpec (news/opens) now in panels; analyzer insights visible; Dreamer/Rainforest features extended with timing for ensemble awareness.
next: Live runs via harness/supervisor will populate rich data automatically. TUI (launch_tui.ps1) and frontend now provide production-grade visibility into the Decision PPO policy decisions and ExecutionAgent lifecycle (fills, partials, trailing moves, per-decision attribution).
